entries.title: Blog
entries.description: Blog posts written in the admin editor are now publicly visible at /blog and /blog/[id]. The homepage now surfaces the latest published post as a teaser immediately below the hero.

entries.title: Picks show correct date for late-night users
entries.description: Dashboard picks now reflect your local date rather than Eastern Time — users in CST, MT, and PT time zones will see the correct day's picks after 11 PM without waiting for midnight ET.

entries.title: Admin pipeline monitoring live
entries.description: Admin page now shows real-time Dagster run history and model freshness from production. Mock data has been removed.

entries.title: Settings page
entries.description: Account settings now available from the gear icon in the top-right nav. Shows your verified email address, subscription tier, and sign-out controls.

entries.title: FAQ & Contact pages
entries.description: Answers to common questions about the model, picks, and platform. Reach us at support@credencesports.com for anything not covered.

entries.title: Admin tab visibility now Cognito-group aware
entries.description: The Admin link in the sub-nav is now shown only to users assigned to the admin Cognito group — no more hardcoded email list.
